HD.rationale: HD trades at the top of its 1-year P/E range (22.0x vs 16.8-22.5x) after a 15.6% 3-month rally, while Q3 showed sequential revenue/EPS decline amid housing headwinds, leaving risk/reward skewed unfavorably.
key_factors: P/E diluted 22.046x sits at the top of the 1-year range (16.8-22.5x), limiting multiple expansion
Stock up +15.6% over 3 months and +8.2% over 1 year, with last close $346.55 — much of the near-term optimism is priced in
Q3 FY23 revenue $37.71B and EPS $3.81 declined sequentially from Q2's $42.92B / $4.65, signaling housing-driven softness
Operating margin 14.5% and ROE 11.0% are decent but not strong enough to justify a premium multiple at cycle peak
